ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent to sync with the DNN module title. This does not display to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens if you want to link directly to this section from elsewhere on the page.

SectionHeading.helper: Required. This is the main heading shown for the section. Basic HTML is allowed if needed.
SectionHeading.placeholder: Measurable outcomes for the human ecosystem.

Image.helper: Required. Use a strong vertical or portrait-leaning image. Recommended minimum size: 1400px wide by 1750px tall for the best crop and clarity.

ValuePropositions.helper: Add as many items as you want, but this template will only display the first 3 in the order shown here.

Title.helper: Required. Short title for this value proposition. Basic HTML is allowed.

Description.helper: Required. Keep this to a few short sentences for the best layout. Basic HTML is allowed.
Description.placeholder: Reducing directed attention fatigue through soft fascination, restoring the group’s capacity for focus and problem-solving.

Icon.helper: Optional. Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building
